patches.summary: Adds StAppKey (ST-App-Key apiKey header) and TenantID fields plus ST_APP_KEY/ST_TENANT_ID env reads to Config.
patches.reason: ServiceTitan uses composed auth (static ST-App-Key apiKey header AND OAuth2 client_credentials bearer), but the v4.6.1 generator wired only the OAuth half (#1303 apiKey half). Every Pricebook path is also tenant-scoped (/tenant/{tenant}/...), which needs a TenantID surface (#1332).
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./internal/config/, end-to-end auth login + categories get-list against live JKA tenant

patches.summary: TrimSpace defensively around all four ST_* env reads (ST_CLIENT_ID, ST_CLIENT_SECRET, ST_APP_KEY, ST_TENANT_ID).
patches.reason: Trailing newlines from PowerShell/.env sourcing produced opaque invalid_client 400s from the ServiceTitan OAuth endpoint. Whitespace-stripping the values at the env-read boundary is the only place this can be fixed without leaking the credential bytes to logs (see JKA env gotcha in user memory).
patches.validated_outcome: auth login succeeds with credentials that have trailing whitespace

patches.summary: Wires the ST-App-Key header into every HTTP request (do() and the dry-run preview).
patches.reason: ServiceTitan rejects calls that present only the OAuth bearer; both halves of the composed auth must be on every request. The generator emitted the bearer half but not the apiKey half (#1303 apiKey half).
patches.validated_outcome: live categories get-list returned real JKA data with both headers present

patches.summary: Populates defaultSyncResources() with the seven Pricebook resource types (categories, equipment, materials, services, discounts-and-fees, materialsmarkup, clientspecificpricing).
patches.reason: The v4.6.1 generator emitted an empty defaultSyncResources(), so `sync` was a no-op (#1305). Resource names match the exact strings the generated list commands use as resourceType keys.
patches.validated_outcome: sync populates the local SQLite store; the 12 novel audit/find/dedupe commands read from it

patches.summary: Populates syncResourcePath() with the seven resource→/tenant/{tenant}/... path mappings and substitutes ST_TENANT_ID at call time.
patches.reason: Companion to sync-default-resources: every Pricebook path is tenant-scoped, but the generator left the path registry empty and did not handle the {tenant} placeholder (#1305 / #1332).
patches.validated_outcome: sync resolves each resource to its tenant-scoped endpoint and writes to the local store

patches.summary: doctor recognizes composed auth as configured when ST_APP_KEY + ST_CLIENT_ID + ST_CLIENT_SECRET are all present, even before the bearer has been minted; also surfaces ST_TENANT_ID readiness.
patches.reason: The generator's doctor only recognized a bearer token as 'configured', so fresh installs of a composed-auth CLI always reported 'unconfigured' until the first call minted a token (#1303 / inventory-retro anti-pattern). Tenant readiness is part of the same readiness check (#1332).
patches.validated_outcome: doctor reports 'configured (composed: ST-App-Key + OAuth2 client_credentials; bearer minted on first call)' when env vars are set

patches.summary: cacheKey() inserts '&' between sorted param entries so different param sets cannot collide on a single cache file.
patches.reason: Greptile review (PR #576): the original loop concatenated 'k=v' with no separator, so {"a":"1b","c":"2"} and {"a":"1","bc":"2"} both produced 'a=1bc=2' — different queries could silently share a cached response.
patches.validated_outcome: go build, go vet, go test ./internal/pricebook/ all clean

patches.summary: CostDrift promotes a bare YYYY-MM-DD --since to end-of-day before comparing against RFC3339 snapshot timestamps so same-day snapshots are included in the baseline window.
patches.reason: Greptile review (PR #576): s.at is stored as RFC3339 ("2026-04-01T08:00:00Z") but --since is documented as YYYY-MM-DD. Lexicographically "2026-04-01T08:00:00Z" sorts after "2026-04-01", so s.at <= since was false for every same-day snapshot — the baseline silently slipped to the previous day.
patches.validated_outcome: go build, go vet, go test ./internal/pricebook/ all clean
